description.zh: 苏维埃社会主义共和国联盟是世界上第一个社会主义国家联盟，以共产党总书记为核心领导，通过政治局进行最高决策。国家计划委员会（Gosplan）制定五年计划实行计划经济，国家安全委员会（KGB）负责情报与反间谍，《真理报》（Pravda）主导意识形态宣传。最高苏维埃名义上为立法机构，实际橡皮图章。党政合一的高度中央集权体制持续近七十年。
description.en: The Union of Soviet Socialist Republics was the world's first socialist state union, led by the General Secretary of the Communist Party through the Politburo as the supreme decision-making body. Gosplan (State Planning Committee) directed the planned economy via Five-Year Plans, the KGB handled intelligence and counterintelligence, and Pravda served as the organ of ideological propaganda. The Supreme Soviet functioned as a nominal legislature rubber-stamping Party decisions. This highly centralized party-state system endured for nearly seventy years.
